Chen Hu йҷіжӣ¶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Hu (йҷіжӣ¶). Sent by Zhuge Liang to attack Huang Yuan. Chen Hu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
